source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 3 - Air-to-Air Weapons

steps.voiced: Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: Weapon Select Switch – A/A GUN, or « LSHIFT+X »
steps.voiced: Set Weapon Select Switch to A/A GUN.

steps.action: Master Mode switch will be automatically set to A/A
steps.voiced: Confirm Master Mode has automatically selected A/A.

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page and select Gun Rounds Options (MK-50 or PGU-28 rounds)
steps.voiced: On the SMS page, select your Gun Rounds option — MK-50 or PGU-28.

steps.action: Set Gun Firing Rate Option (HI = 6000 rounds per minute, LO = 4000 rounds per minute) Sensor Control Switch AFT/FWD/LEFT/RIGHT Gun rounds remaining Weapon Select Switch FWD: Select Sparrow AFT: Select Gun PRESS DOWN: Select Sidewinder RIGHT: Select Amraam LEFT: No Function
steps.voiced: Set Gun Firing Rate to HI for 6,000 rpm or LO for 4,000 rpm.
